baseline_before_changes.note: The initial all-tests invocation exceeded the available execution window. This is reported as incomplete, not as a full baseline pass.

after_changes.execution_mode: controlled groups covering every collected node
after_changes.one_shot_note: A cumulative process around the requirements import test exceeded the tool window. The entire file was split into 31 tests plus the final 2 tests; all 33 passed. Every collected test node was executed successfully.

final_hardening_revalidation.affected_regression_modules: passed when executed in fresh processes; cumulative pytest teardown stalls are documented

environment.platform_note: Local verification is not a substitute for final Streamlit Community Cloud execution on Python 3.12.
